days.title: Arrive in Zürich
days.description: Arrive in Switzerland, check into the hotel, explore Zürich's Altstadt, and enjoy dinner along the Limmat.

locations.name: Zürich Hauptbahnhof
locations.description: Zürich's central railway station and the primary transit hub for the city.
notes: Use this station for connections to Lucerne and the airport.
Confirm the departure platform in the SBB app.

locations.name: Bahnhofstrasse
locations.description: Central Zürich shopping avenue connecting the main station area with Lake Zürich.

locations.name: Lindenhof
locations.description: A peaceful historic hilltop with views over the Limmat River and Zürich's Old Town.

locations.name: Niederdorf and Old Town
locations.description: Pedestrian lanes, historic buildings, cafés, shops, and squares in Zürich's Old Town.

locations.name: Bürkliplatz and Lake Zürich
locations.description: Lakeside promenade and city viewpoint near the southern end of Bahnhofstrasse.

schedule.title: Arrive and transfer into Zürich
schedule.description: Clear arrival formalities, activate local connectivity, and travel into central Zürich.

schedule.title: Hotel check-in and reset
schedule.description: Drop luggage, eat something light, and allow time to recover from the overnight flight.

schedule.title: Old Town walking loop
schedule.description: Walk through Bahnhofstrasse, Lindenhof, Niederdorf, and the lanes along the Limmat.

schedule.title: Lake Zürich and dinner
schedule.description: Finish near Bürkliplatz and choose dinner based on energy level and weather.

notes: Check the live SBB schedule after landing.
Keep passports and valuables accessible during the transfer.
Keep arrival day intentionally flexible.
Prioritize hydration, food, and sleep over completing every stop.
Use public transportation if jet lag makes the full walking loop uncomfortable.

days.title: Lucerne
days.description: Visit Chapel Bridge, explore the historic old town, see the Lion Monument, and enjoy the Lake Lucerne waterfront.

locations.name: Lucerne Railway Station
locations.description: The arrival point for the Zürich-to-Lucerne train and an easy starting point for the walking itinerary.

locations.name: Chapel Bridge
locations.description: Lucerne's landmark covered wooden bridge and water tower.

locations.name: Lucerne Old Town
locations.description: Historic squares, decorated façades, pedestrian streets, and shops north of the Reuss River.

locations.name: Lion Monument
locations.description: The Lion of Lucerne rock monument in a small park near the historic center.

locations.name: Musegg Wall
locations.description: Historic city fortifications and towers overlooking Lucerne.
notes: Tower access can be seasonal.
Skip the climb if weather or mobility makes it uncomfortable.

locations.name: Lake Lucerne Waterfront
locations.description: Promenade with lake, mountain, boat, and city views near the station.

schedule.title: Train from Zürich to Lucerne
schedule.description: Take a direct morning train and begin the day near Lucerne station.

schedule.title: Chapel Bridge and Old Town
schedule.description: Cross Chapel Bridge, explore the riverfront, and continue into Lucerne's historic squares.

schedule.title: Lunch in the Old Town
schedule.description: Choose a restaurant based on weather, menu preferences, and wait time.

schedule.title: Lion Monument and optional Musegg Wall
schedule.description: Visit the Lion Monument, then continue to the Musegg Wall if energy and weather allow.

schedule.title: Lakefront and return to Zürich
schedule.description: Relax by the waterfront before returning to Zürich by train.

notes: Confirm the live departure and platform in the SBB app.
Return timing can remain flexible unless another reservation requires a specific train.
Most central Lucerne stops can be connected on foot.
The Musegg Wall adds elevation and stairs; treat it as optional.
Leave flexibility for a lake cruise if weather and timing are favorable.

days.title: Grindelwald
days.description: Travel into the Bernese Oberland, settle into Grindelwald, and explore the alpine village beneath the Eiger.

locations.name: Grindelwald Railway Station
locations.description: Central village railway station and arrival point for the traditional rail route.

locations.name: Grindelwald Terminal
locations.description: Transport hub providing access to the Eiger Express and mountain connections.

locations.name: Grindelwald Village Center
locations.description: Alpine village center with shops, restaurants, hotels, and views toward the Eiger.

locations.name: Grindelwald-First Gondola Station
locations.description: Valley gondola station for Grindelwald-First mountain excursions.

locations.name: First Cliff Walk
locations.description: Mountain walkway and viewing platform reached from Grindelwald-First.
notes: Mountain operations are weather-dependent.
Confirm operating status before leaving the village.

schedule.title: Travel into the Bernese Oberland
schedule.description: Depart Zürich and travel through the Interlaken region toward Grindelwald.

schedule.title: Arrive and settle in
schedule.description: Check in or store luggage, then orient around the village and transportation hubs.

schedule.title: Explore Grindelwald
schedule.description: Walk through the village, visit viewpoints, and confirm the next day's Jungfraujoch route.

schedule.title: Optional Grindelwald-First excursion
schedule.description: Use the First gondola and Cliff Walk only if arrival time, visibility, and operating conditions make it practical.

notes: The exact connection may require transfers.
Check live routing and platform information in the SBB app.
Mountain visibility should determine whether Grindelwald-First is attempted.
Preserve enough energy for the Jungfraujoch excursion the following day.
Confirm breakfast or early-food options for the next morning.

days.title: Jungfraujoch
days.description: Journey to the Top of Europe, visit the Sphinx Observatory and Ice Palace, and experience the high-Alpine scenery.

locations.name: Grindelwald Terminal
locations.description: Starting point for the Eiger Express route toward Jungfraujoch.

locations.name: Eiger Express
locations.description: Gondola connection between Grindelwald Terminal and Eigergletscher.

locations.name: Eigergletscher Station
locations.description: Transfer point between the Eiger Express and the Jungfrau Railway.

locations.name: Jungfraujoch Railway Station
locations.description: High-altitude rail arrival point for the Jungfraujoch complex.

locations.name: Sphinx Observatory
locations.description: High-altitude viewing terraces overlooking glaciers and surrounding peaks.

locations.name: Ice Palace
locations.description: Indoor passage through ice features within the Jungfraujoch visitor complex.

locations.name: Alpine Sensation
locations.description: Indoor exhibition connecting the station, Ice Palace, and Sphinx areas.

schedule.title: Arrive at Grindelwald Terminal
schedule.description: Arrive before the reserved connection, verify tickets, and follow signs for the Eiger Express.

schedule.title: Eiger Express to Eigergletscher
schedule.description: Ride the gondola to Eigergletscher and transfer to the Jungfrau Railway.

schedule.title: Jungfrau Railway ascent
schedule.description: Continue by cogwheel railway from Eigergletscher to Jungfraujoch.

schedule.title: Explore Jungfraujoch
schedule.description: Visit the Sphinx terraces, Alpine Sensation, Ice Palace, and indoor visitor areas.

schedule.title: Return to Grindelwald
schedule.description: Retrace the railway and Eiger Express route, allowing time for transfers and weather delays.

notes: Follow the live operating information and reservation instructions.
Board only the connection matching the ticket or seat reservation.
Allow time to find the correct transfer platform.
Keep tickets accessible throughout the journey.
Check operating status, mountain weather, and visibility before departure.
Bring layers, sunglasses, sunscreen, water, and appropriate footwear.
Move slowly at altitude and take breaks if anyone develops headache, dizziness, nausea, or unusual shortness of breath.
Do not force outdoor snow activities if visibility or conditions are poor.

accommodations.name: Zürich lodging
notes: Enter the final property name, address, and confirmation reference.
Confirm luggage-storage and check-in procedures before departure.

accommodations.name: Grindelwald lodging
notes: Enter the final property name, address, and confirmation reference.
Confirm the route from the station or terminal to the property.

accommodations.name: Final Switzerland lodging
notes: Replace this placeholder with the final July 25–29 reservation.
Record cancellation rules and check-in instructions.

reservations.title: Arrival flight to Zürich
notes: Add airline, flight number, departure airport, and confirmation reference.
Store boarding passes in the airline application and offline.

reservations.title: Return flight from Switzerland
notes: Add airline, flight number, airport, and confirmation reference.
Confirm airport transfer timing at least one day before departure.

reservations.title: Jungfraujoch excursion
notes: Enter ticket and seat-reservation information after purchase.
Verify weather, operating status, and departure time before travel.

reservations.title: Swiss rail transportation
notes: Record the selected rail pass or point-to-point ticket strategy.
Keep digital tickets available offline.

reservations.title: Swisscom tourist mobile service
notes: Install and activate the tourist eSIM.
Configure the Swisscom line for mobile data.
Prevent unintended Visible international usage.

documents.title: Ken passport
documents.storageLocation: Physical passport and encrypted offline copy
notes: Verify validity and pack in personal item.

documents.title: Spouse passport
documents.storageLocation: Physical passport and encrypted offline copy
notes: Verify validity and pack in personal item.

documents.title: Son passport
documents.storageLocation: Physical passport and encrypted offline copy
notes: Verify validity and pack in personal item.

documents.title: Travel insurance documentation
documents.storageLocation: BEAST Travel and offline device storage
notes: Record insurer, policy number, emergency phone number, and coverage dates.

documents.title: Offline reservation copies
notes: Save lodging, flight, rail, and attraction confirmations as PDFs or screenshots.

checklist.title: Verify all passports and expiration dates
Save all confirmations for offline access
Install SBB Mobile and download trip information
Confirm Jungfraujoch tickets and operating status
Record lodging addresses and check-in instructions
Review cards, PINs, and international transaction settings
Pack rain protection and mountain layers
Verify Tailscale remote access before departure
Complete home, server, printer, and security check

emergencyNotes: Keep passports, medications, payment cards, and phones in carry-on luggage.
Store emergency contacts and insurance details offline.
Use 112 for the general European emergency number.
At high altitude, descend and seek help if severe symptoms develop.
Do not place real passport numbers or full payment-card information in the repository.
